https://github.com/jess-bergs/agent-kanban/pull/23
Done! Here's what was built:

**`server/mcp.ts`** — A standalone MCP server that exposes 9 tools and 2 resources, wrapping the same `store.ts` functions the Express API uses:

| Tool | Maps to |
|------|---------|
| `list_projects` | GET /api/projects |
| `create_project` | POST /api/projects |
| `delete_project` | DELETE /api/projects/:id |
| `list_tickets` | GET /api/tickets |
| `create_ticket` | POST /api/tickets |
| `get_ticket` | GET /api/tickets/:id |
| `update_ticket` | PATCH /api/tickets/:id |
| `delete_ticket` | DELETE /api/tickets/:id |
| `retry_ticket` | POST /api/tickets/:id/retry |

To use it, add to your Claude Code MCP config:
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "agent-kanban": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["tsx", "server/mcp.ts"],
      "cwd": "/path/to/agent-kanban"
    }
  }
}
```

https://github.com/jess-bergs/agent-kanban/pull/23
